steps.title: Prepare a lysis master mix of...
steps.instruction: Prepare a lysis master mix of the following reagents and mix by vortexing briefly: %s %s

steps.title: Place the spin column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new 2mL collection tube and add 500 µL Buffer AW1 (provided in kit) to the column. Centrifuge at 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute . Discard the flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Transfer the lysed cell mixture to...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysed cell mixture to a labeled DNeasy mini spin column in a 2mL collection tube (both provided in the kit).

steps.title: Spin down the lysis tubes briefly,...
steps.instruction: Spin down the lysis tubes briefly, then add 200 µL of 96-100% ethanol to the lysed cells. Mix thoroughly by vortexing. Spin the tubes down to remove drops from lids.

steps.title: Incubate the resuspended cells at 56...
steps.instruction: Incubate the resuspended cells at 56 °C with agitation at 1500 rpm, °C, 30 minutes .

steps.title: Add resuspended cells in 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Add resuspended cells in 100 µL DPBS to an appropriately labeled tube containing the lysis master mix. Mix by vortexing.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellets in 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellets in 100 µL DPBS for every 5 x 10 6 cells in each sample pellet. If you have 10 x 10 6 cells in your pellet, resuspend in 200 µL , then split into 2 separate tubes.

steps.title: Aliquot 322 µL of this master mix into labeled 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 322 µL of this master mix into labeled 1.7-mL microcentrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Quantitate with the Nanodrop, and store...
steps.instruction: Quantitate with the Nanodrop, and store the samples at -20 °C .

steps.title: Repeat go to step #13 with...
steps.instruction: Repeat go to step #13 with an additional 100 µL of molecular grade water.

steps.title: Transfer any split samples (pellets with...
steps.instruction: Transfer any split samples (pellets with more than 5 x 10 6 cells) into labeled 2.0mL microcentrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of molecular grade...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of molecular grade water to the spin column and incubate at Room temperature for 00:02:00 . Centrifuge at 6000 x g, °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Place the spin column in a new (labeled) 1
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new (labeled) 1.7-mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Place the spin column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new 2mL collection tube and centrifuge at 20000 x g, °C, 1 minute . Discard.

steps.title: Place the spin column in a...
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube and add 500 µL Buffer AW2 (provided in kit) to the column. Centrifuge at 20000 x g, °C, 3 minutes . Discard the flow-through and collection tube.
